PR surface: Tests -4. Total -4 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-only cleanup PR rather than a bug report. The diff and PR body provide the reviewable behavior: neutralized fixture names and a less racy MCP test assertion.

target.title: test(agents): use neutral tool schema fixtures
target.body:
## Summary

- replaces reported plugin/tool fixture names with neutral synthetic `fuzzplugin` / `mockplugin` names in tests and expected diagnostics
- keeps this PR test-only and deliberately excludes the runtime-quarantine test files now owned by #88368
- stabilizes one MCP runtime test log assertion by waiting for the existing server log helper instead of reading before the async write flushes

## Landing note

This is hygiene, not the runtime fix. It can land before the schema-hardening PRs because it avoids their runtime-quarantine test files, but it should not block the critical behavior fixes if GitHub flakes again.

## Verification

- rebuilt the PR from current `origin/main` e1a98171417c into head f34707507fa, reducing the PR from +123/-127 across 14 files to +114/-118 across 11 files
- synthetic sequential merge proof for #88491 -> #88368 -> #88493 completed without conflicts using `git merge-tree --write-tree`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/agents-models-skills.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-tools.materialize.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/commands/doctor/repair-sequencing.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/active-tool-schema-warnings.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`: 6 routed shards, 197 tests passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts`: 27 tests passed
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check` plus touched-file scrub for reported fixture names, private local paths, and install-error output: clean
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: passed on run `run_f749e4297816`, lease `cbx_812307f4af8c` / `silver-lobster` (provider=aws, command 9m50s, total 12m27s)
- GitHub checks on f34707507fa settled with 115 success, 0 failed/pending, 24 skipped, and 1 neutral

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: test fixtures no longer preserve report-specific plugin/tool names in reusable runtime-schema diagnostics.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw `gwt` worktree based on current `origin/main` e1a98171417c, plus AWS Crabbox Linux proof for the changed gate on head f34707507fa.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: rebuilt the PR as a reduced single commit, ran targeted fixture tests, formatter check, targeted lint check, diff check, scrub, autoreview, synthetic sequential merge proof, AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`, and watched GitHub CI to green.

Evidence after fix: touched tests and expected diagnostics use neutral synthetic names, and the first-wave PR sequence no longer conflicts on runtime-quarantine test files.

Observed result after fix: the scrub PR stays test-only, avoids the overlapping runtime-quarantine files, and its MCP runtime log assertion no longer races CI log flushing.

What was not tested: no product runtime behavior; this is intentionally tests-only fixture cleanup.
